auth.registration_success: Registration successful! Taking you to login...
auth.register_subtitle: Track your Quran memorization journey with Thabat
auth.login_subtitle: Welcome back to your Quran memorization journey
auth.already_have_account: Already have an account? Sign in
auth.dont_have_account: Don't have an account? Create one

dashboard.quote: "Read the Quran, for it will come as an intercessor for its reciters on the Day of Resurrection."
dashboard.fetch_error: Unable to load your progress data at this time.
dashboard.refresh_msg: Please refresh the page or try logging in again.
dashboard.update_subtitle: Log the pages you've memorized today to maintain your streak.
dashboard.invalid_input: Please enter a valid positive number of pages.
dashboard.streak_saved_msg: Masha'Allah! Even with the delay, you did it. We're proud of you!
dashboard.sunnah_question: Did you recite your new hifz in Sunnah/Nawafil prayers today?
dashboard.sunnah_desc: Reciting in Sunnah prayers is the ultimate stabilization technique.
dashboard.golden_rule_msg: Don't recite what you learned today to your teacher yet! Test yourself every 8 hours, and recite tomorrow for long-term mastery.

recovery.doctor_title: It's okay, let's start fresh with a small step
recovery.doctor_subtitle: Stumbling is not the end; returning to the Quran is the true victory.

voice.title: Recite to Me (Voice Recitation)
voice.click_to_start: Click the button and start reciting
